response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical breadth, strong open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and client-facing advisory roles, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical gap given the C1 requirement. His recent career gap and lack of formal team management titles also raise questions about executive readiness.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse languages and environments (DLang, Node, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content (workshops, courses)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the required C1 level
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or client advisory experience
Recent career gap and lack of formal team leadership or project management titles
